title: Arrow Magnet
description: Curio accessory that makes every landed arrow (on blocks) safely return to sender in one piece!
body:
Ever tired of different arrow variants (e.g spectral or tipped), vanilla or modded, being incompatible with the infinity enchantment (or, well, simply just not having the infinity enchantment in the first place. That or you're a mending > infinity kind of person)? Well that's what this mod aims to solve, or at least, partially alleviate the hassle thereof. The mod adds a curio accessory to the game that magnetizes all arrows that have landed on blocks **from just about any distance** back to the player for collection. This only pertains to arrows that are fired by their respective players and do not originate from bows with the infinity enchantment. The accessory ensures that no arrow of any cost goes to waste as a consequence of missed shots or whatnot.
This mod pairs especially well with mods that add arrows with the ability to remain intact even after colliding with an entity.

**Note that the item does NOT carry out its function right away when equipping it in your charm slot. You have to activate it with a right-click while holding it before it works.** Aside from equipping it as a curio, holding it in your main/off-hand will also allow it to carry out its magnetization function.


### Mod Recommendations
- [Simple Magnets](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-magnets) or any other mod that adds item magnets.
- [Fabulous Fletching,](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabulous-fletching) the primary catalyst to this mod's conception.


## Item Recipes

Prior to crafting the main accessory, the player must also craft its core ingredient beforehand, that being its catalyst.

### Catalyst of Arrow Magnetism
![Crafting recipe for the Catalyst of Arrow Magnetism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7EjhQg8u/images/36c2836c589c209db560d6a3d4f4dba5d8e2b2cd.png)
- 2x Ghast Tear
- 1x Eye of Ender
- 1x Arrow
- 2x Ender Pearl
- 1x Bow
- 1x Spectral Arrow
- 1x Emerald

### Arrow Magnet
![Crafting recipe for the Arrow Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7EjhQg8u/images/ab7286a619c059e205661b8993e992d7249d1c52.png)
- 2x Diamond
- 1x Iron Ingot
- 2x Copper Ingot
- **1x Catalyst of Arrow Magnetism**
- 1x Gold Ingot
